sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: News Corp Updates US$1 Billion Nasdaq Share Buy-Back, Excludes ASX CDIs

feed.title: Whitehawk Therapeutics Presents Comprehensive Preclinical Data Highlighting its Next-Generation ADC Portfolio at the AACR 2026
feed.summary: Whitehawk Therapeutics presented comprehensive preclinical data for its next-generation Antibody Drug Conjugate (ADC) portfolio, including HWK-007, HWK-016, and HWK-206, at the AACR 2026 meeting. The data demonstrated potent tumor regressions at low doses, high plasma stability, and favorable tolerability, with phase 1 trials ongoing for the first two and an IND submission planned for HWK-206 in mid-2026. These results highlight the potential for Whitehawk's proprietary Carbon Bridge Cysteine Re-pairing platform to deliver differentiated, potentially best-in-class therapeutic ADCs for various cancers.

feed.title: Mizuho Cuts PT on ADMA Biologics Inc. (ADMA) to $24 From $30
feed.summary: Mizuho has lowered its price target on ADMA Biologics Inc. (ADMA) to $24 from $30, while maintaining an Outperform rating. Separately, Cantor Fitzgerald downgraded ADMA to Neutral due to investor concerns regarding channel stuffing allegations and the company's communication response, as well as clarity issues regarding increased days' sales outstanding and accounts receivable.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Downgrades ADMA Biologics Inc. (ADMA) to Neutral From Overweight
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald downgraded ADMA Biologics Inc. (ADMA) to Neutral from Overweight after discussions with investors regarding a short report alleging "channel stuffing" to boost revenue. The firm cited investor disappointment over the company's response and lack of direct communication, along with concerns regarding increased days' sales outstanding and accounts receivable, as reasons for the downgrade. ADMA Biologics refuted the allegations as "unsubstantiated, misleading, and inaccurate."

feed.title: Mizuho Cuts PT on ADMA Biologics Inc. (ADMA) to $24 From $30

feed.title: Point72, BlackRock-Backed Contest Seeks Japanese Banking Talent
feed.summary: A competition backed by BlackRock Inc. and Point72 Asset Management challenged Japanese college students to analyze consumer product companies by obsessing over sales data from supermarkets and drugstores. The initiative aims to identify and cultivate finance talent in Japan. This rigorous analysis tested their capabilities for a career in finance.

feed.title: RBC Capital Lifts PT on Incyte Corporation (INCY) to $95 From $92

Incyte reported strong Q4 2025 financial results, with total revenue up 28% to $1.51 billion, driven by product and milestone revenue growth.

feed.title: Bill Hornbuckle and MGM China executive team meet with China’s Vice Premier He Lifeng to discuss tourism collaboration
feed.summary: MGM Resorts CEO Bill Hornbuckle and MGM China executives met with China's Vice Premier He Lifeng in Beijing to discuss tourism collaboration, cultural exchange, and economic activity. The meeting, which also included officials from the Hong Kong and Macau Affairs Office, focused on supporting bilateral tourism and expanding travel beyond major cities. Hornbuckle reaffirmed MGM's long-term vision for Macau and mainland China, emphasizing high-quality experiences rooted in local culture.

feed.title: Teleflex Nominates Director, Plans Share Buybacks and Board Changes
feed.summary: Teleflex Incorporated (NYSE: TFX) has nominated Michael J. Tokich as an independent director, announced plans for early share repurchases, and will implement board leadership changes, including Andrew A. Krakauer becoming chairman. The company also intends to form a Growth and Operating Committee to enhance operational execution and identify expansion opportunities. These actions are part of Teleflex's strategy to address its undervalued stock price and continue its divestiture transactions.

feed.title: Ascentage Pharma Showcases Promising Combination Oncology Data at AACR 2026
feed.summary: Ascentage Pharma will present preclinical data for its key drug candidates olverembatinib, APG-2449, and APG-5918 at the AACR 2026 Annual Meeting. The data highlight the company's strategy of using targeted and combination therapies to address resistance mechanisms in cancer. Olverembatinib (HK:6855) showed strong antitumor activity and synergy in combination therapies for endometrial carcinoma models and mantle cell lymphoma, with a recent analyst rating of Buy and a HK$93.00 price target.

feed.title: Ascentage Pharma to Present Four Promising Preclinical Studies Demonstrating the Potential of Combination Therapies at American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) 2026 Annual Meeting
feed.summary: Ascentage Pharma announced it will present four preclinical studies at the AACR 2026 Annual Meeting, highlighting new combination therapy potentials for its drug candidates Olverembatinib, APG-2449, and APG-5918. The studies explore Olverembatinib's use beyond CML in endometrial carcinoma and mantle cell lymphoma, APG-2449 in BRAF-mutant tumors, and APG-5918 in small-cell lung cancer, focusing on addressing resistance mechanisms and enhancing therapeutic efficacy. These findings aim to inform future clinical development strategies for various cancer types.

feed.title: Leukemia drug tested beyond CML in 4 cancer combination studies
feed.summary: Ascentage Pharma announced it will present four preclinical studies at the AACR 2026 Annual Meeting, highlighting the potential of combination therapies for its drug candidates Olverembatinib (HQP1351), APG-2449, and APG-5918. These studies explore Olverembatinib's use beyond CML in endometrial carcinoma and mantle cell lymphoma, APG-2449's efficacy in BRAF-mutant tumors, and APG-5918's synergy with topoisomerase I inhibitors in small-cell lung cancer. The findings aim to inform clinical development strategies and complement ongoing registrational trials, addressing resistance mechanisms in various cancers.

feed.title: Assessing Taseko Mines (TSX:TKO) Valuation After Strong Multi Year Shareholder Returns
feed.summary: Taseko Mines (TSX:TKO) has seen significant share price appreciation, with a 34% increase in the past month and 2.6x return over one year, bringing its multi-year total returns to about 3.7x. Analysts currently peg the fair value at CA$12.61, suggesting an 18% undervaluation from its last close of CA$10.53, based on expectations of improved free cash flow and potential deleveraging from operational gains. However, its current P/S ratio of 5.7x is above its fair ratio of 3.5x, indicating potential overpricing relative to sales, and risks such as permitting setbacks are noted.

feed.title: Autonomous & Self-Driving Vehicle News: aymo, Lucid Group, PIF, Uber, Nuro, Illinois Teamsters, Massimo Group, AIBO Robotics, GAC Aion, WeRide, Qualcomm & NVIDIA | auto connected car news
